name: node-unicode-match-property-value-ecmascript
title: node-unicode-match-property-value-ecmascript
summary: Match a Unicode property value to its canonical version in Node.js
description:
Match a Unicode property value to its canonical version in Node.js
This module provides a function to match a Unicode property value to its
canonical version (without applying the loose matching algorithm) following
the RegExp Unicode property escapes in ECMAScript.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-unicode-match-property-value-ecmascript because Match a Unicode property value to its canonical version in Node.js.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-unicode-match-property-value-ecmascript as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-unicode-match-property-value-ecmascript with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-unicode-match-property-value-ecmascript --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
